caption: In the video, two men are seated side by side against a backdrop featuring lush jungle scenery and the title "Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle." The man on the left, wearing a dark blue shirt and a gold necklace, is seen adjusting his ear with his right hand, which has a ring on it. He appears to be engaged in conversation, looking slightly to his right. The man on the right, dressed in a black outfit with red accents and wearing glasses, is initially seen covering his mouth with his hand, possibly in thought or contemplation. As the video progresses, he leans forward, resting his head on his hands, suggesting a moment of reflection or amusement. The overall setting suggests an interview or promotional event for the movie.
